zh.lifeSummary: 當Irmgard von Geldern於大約1192年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，她的父親Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen43歲，母親Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern29歲。她和Adolf I. von der Mark至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1249年6月24日享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Irmgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Irmgard von Geldern was born about 1192, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, was 43 and her mother, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, was 29. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Adolf I. von der Mark. She died on 24 June 1249, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Irmgard von Geldern est née environ 1192, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Adolf I. von der Mark. Elle est décédée le 24 juin 1249, à l’âge de 58 ans.

Juni 1249 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Irmgard von Geldern è nata il circa 1192 nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Adolf I. von der Mark. Morì il 24 giugno 1249, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.Preußen: 독일 프레우ss 그렌즈마크 데우츠치 크론 프레우ss도르프
ko.lifeSummary: Irmgard von Geldern(이)가 대략 1192년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Adolf I. von der Mark(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 6월 24일 58세의 나이로 사망했다.
